FIT4012 Lab4 - Evidence log

Build:
g++ -std=c++17 -Wall -Wextra -pedantic des.cpp -o des

DES sample (mode 1)
Input plaintext:
0001001000110100010101100111100010011010101111001101111011110001
Input key:
0001001100110100010101110111100110011011101111001101111111110001
Output ciphertext:
0111111010111111010001001001001100100011111110101111101011111000

DES multi-block + zero padding (mode 1)
Input plaintext:
00010010001101000101011001111000100110101011110011011110111100011010101010101010
Input key:
0001001100110100010101110111100110011011101111001101111111110001
Output ciphertext:
01111110101111110100010010010011001000111111101011111010111110000100000010010001101001000010011111010110110001100000111000110100

TripleDES encrypt (mode 3)
Output ciphertext:
0000100111010100110001011011100101000001100001100000010111111010

TripleDES decrypt (mode 4)
Output plaintext:
0001001000110100010101100111100010011010101111001101111011110001
